input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.1
            TITLE: presentation event objective

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.1: Presentation Event Objective
S.2.1 Presentation Event Objective 
The Presentation Event evaluates the team’s ability to develop and deliver a comprehensive 
business, logistical, production, or technical case that will convince outside interests to invest 
in the team’s concept.

final_answer: rule S.2.1: Presentation Event Objective S.2.1 Presentation Event Objective The Presentation Event evaluates the team’s ability to develop and deliver a comprehensive business, logistical, production, or technical case that will convince outside interests to invest in the team’s concept.
